Name: QualityStandardName
Description: Name of the QualityStandard using the DDI Name structure.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the QualityStandard.

Name: StandardUsed
Description: Provide the citation and location of the source published standard using the OtherMaterialType.

Description: Provides a list of quality concepts in the quality standard.
